## Purpose

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Summary of Changes

<!-- Bullet list of key changes -->

-

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature — new functionality
- [ ] Fix — bug fix
- [ ] Refactor — code improvement (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs — documentation only
- [ ] Chore — dependencies, CI, tooling
- [ ] Test — adding or updating tests

## Testing & Validation

<!-- How was this tested? What should the reviewer verify? -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`bundle exec rspec`)
- [ ] Linter passes (`bundle exec rubocop`)
- [ ] Security scan passes (`bin/brakeman`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`npx playwright test`) *(if UI changed)*
- [ ] Manual testing performed

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- If UI changed, include before/after screenshots -->

## Linked Issues

<!-- Reference related issues: Closes #123, Relates to #456 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or API keys in the diff
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No `binding.pry`, `debugger`, or `console.log` left in code
